summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatEmbed AI new features: Templates, Embed.js widget, Team management, and template banner integration. Backend API testing achieved 81.8% success rate with core features working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Timeout/no response when accessing team endpoints
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior for non-Agency users is 403, but endpoints are not responding

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Timeout/no response when testing team invite
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior for non-Agency users is 403, but endpoints are not responding

ui_bugs.issue: Button click in customization dialog has overlay interception

integration_issues.issue: Sessions expire quickly during testing, requiring frequent re-login

passed_tests: Template structure validation (id, name, icon, category, business_name, faq_content)
Expected template IDs present (baeckerei, zahnarzt, restaurant, friseur, immobilien, anwalt)
GET /api/embed.js returns valid JavaScript widget (9046 characters)
Templates page displays all 6 template cards
Chatbot create page shows template banner with count
Template banner links to templates page
Embed.js endpoint accessible with correct content-type
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate team management endpoint connectivity issues - endpoints are timing out instead of returning expected 403 responses for non-Agency users. This may be a network/server configuration issue.
